title: BuildUnit
description: Request body for POST /players/me/units/{unitId}/build. Starts construction of a target unit type at the chosen planet hex building zone. Side zones share a slot with the neighboring hex; environment and occupancy rules apply to both hexes when relevant.

planetId.description: Planet where the builder unit currently operates.

targetTypeId.description: Catalog id of the unit type to build.

targetHex.description: Axial coordinates where the new unit will be placed.

buildingZoneId.description: Building zone within the target hex where the unit will be placed. Small footprints only (one zone).
